title: saussurea lyrata
intro: Saussurea lyrata, also known as the Lhasa snow lotus or Tibet snow lotus, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas and is traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Saussurea lyrata is typically prepared as a herbal tea or extract, and its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health.
